Represents the chronological day index from the start of the presentation.

Randomly generated with a 3% probability per day to simulate sporadic ad campaigns.
Set to 1 during predetermined recurring 5-day periods (e.g., days 90-95, 190-195) to simulate public holidays.

Sum of linear trend, weekly sine-wave seasonality, semester start spikes, holiday drops, marketing spikes, and Gaussian noise. Clipped at 0.
